name: QQ NapCat Channel
description: QQ channel integration for Alma. Connects to NapCat/OneBot 11 to send/receive messages, manage groups, and handle @ mentions with intelligent trigger detection.

tools.name: Send Private Message
tools.description: Send a private message to a QQ user

tools.name: Send Group Message
tools.description: Send a message to a QQ group

tools.name: Send Image
tools.description: Send an image to a QQ user or group

tools.name: Send Voice
tools.description: Send a voice message to a QQ user or group

tools.name: Send File
tools.description: Send a file to a QQ group

tools.name: Send Rich Message
tools.description: Send a rich QQ message with mixed segments

tools.name: Send Thread Rich Message
tools.description: Send a rich QQ message to a QQ thread

tools.name: Get Friend List
tools.description: Get the list of QQ friends

tools.name: Get Group List
tools.description: Get the list of QQ groups

tools.name: Get Group Members
tools.description: Get the member list of a QQ group

tools.name: Group Kick
tools.description: Kick a member from a group

tools.name: Group Ban
tools.description: Ban a member in a group

tools.name: Set Group Card
tools.description: Set a member's card/nickname in a group

tools.name: Get Message History
tools.description: Get recent message history from a group

qqchannel.configJson.default:
{
  "napcatWsUrl": "ws://127.0.0.1:6099/ws",
  "almaModel": "openai:gpt-4o",
  "almaVisionModel": "",
  "token": "",
  "botQQ": "",
  "allowFrom": ["private", "group:YOUR_GROUP_ID"],
  "respondToDirectMessage": true,
  "respondToGroupMessage": false,
  "respondToAt": true,
  "respondToReply": true,
  "groupContextMessageLimit": 20,
  "groupContextCharLimit": 4000,
  "atReplyEnabled": true,
  "groupPolicies": {
    "YOUR_GROUP_ID": {
      "respondToGroupMessage": true,
      "respondToReply": true,
      "groupContextMessageLimit": 30,
      "atReplyEnabled": false
    }
  }
}
qqchannel.configJson.description: JSON configuration for QQ NapCat Channel. botQQ can be left empty and will be auto-detected from NapCat login. almaVisionModel is used for image understanding when incoming messages contain pictures. groupPolicies lets each QQ group override reply strategy independently. Advanced keys such as keywords, rate limits, and custom reply templates are still supported but omitted here. Legacy qqchannel.* keys are still read as fallback.
